resume.name: Sangmin Lee
introduction: I aim to build comfortable services that users can trust.
Beyond delivering assigned development work, I enjoy turning team inefficiencies into systems that save colleagues time.
Improving the work experience of the people I work with is one of the main reasons I develop software.

oprimed.achievement: Handled frontend development for medical and clinical analysis products, including the transition of server integration structure, UI component migration and rendering performance improvements, and the setup of frontend runtime and CI/CD workflows.

medicalFrontendProductization.title: Server Integration Transition, UI Migration, and Frontend Execution System Setup

descriptions.subtitle: Server integration transition and user flow implementation for analysis products
descriptions.detail: The same server data was being fetched directly by multiple screens, scattering cache, refetch, and maintenance rules. The flow from analysis results to the next analysis also needed clear screen transition and state-passing rules.
descriptions.skills: Next.js, React, TypeScript, TanStack Query, Zustand, React Hook Form, ECharts, Plotly, Playwright, GitHub Actions, Husky, Docker
tasks: Converted server data fetching to a shared TanStack Query-based structure and removed 6 direct disease-list calls.
Implemented task creation, state transfer, and screen transition flows from the analysis result screen to connect follow-up analysis flows.
Separated areas that needed redefinition from non-working flows and shared them with the team, leading to clearer error, empty-state, and loading handling standards.

descriptions.subtitle: UI component migration and rendering performance improvement
descriptions.detail: Some UI depended on images and caused unnecessary network requests, while inconsistent UI implementations across screens increased maintenance cost.
tasks: Migrated image-based UI to code-based shared components, removing 3 runtime PNG requests and about 315 KiB of payload.
Confirmed Lighthouse improvements by reducing LCP from 1.3s to 1.0s and Speed Index from 3.4s to 0.7s.
Added a static image WebP conversion flow and reduced transferred image resources by about 95%.
Introduced shared component usage standards and removed 25 legacy button imports and 34 static SVG files.
Reduced 529 direct hex color usages to improve color management standards.

descriptions.subtitle: Frontend runtime and CI/CD workflow setup
descriptions.detail: Different dependency, runtime, and pre-deployment verification standards across projects caused repeated build and validation issues, and errors that could be caught at commit or push time were reaching deployment preparation.
tasks: Standardized frontend runtime by aligning security patches, dependency lockfiles, Docker runtime, and Node.js versions.
Connected commit, push, and pre-deployment verification with GitHub Actions CI/CD and Husky pre-commit/pre-push hooks.
Introduced Playwright CLI-based verification with passing examples for 3-browser single runs and a 6-combination browser/viewport matrix.

commerceBackoffice.title: Commerce and Back-office Product Development as an Early Member

descriptions.subtitle: Customer e-commerce and operator back-office development
descriptions.detail: Joined as an early member and developed both the customer e-commerce service and operator back office. The team needed to improve customer-facing flows and operator screens at the same time, while scattered order, product, seller, settlement, event, and inquiry data increased repetitive work.
descriptions.skills: Next.js, React, TypeScript, MUI, Tailwind CSS, Jotai, SWR, React Hook Form
tasks: Developed multilingual, payment, gifting, draw, product, order, and my-page flows for the Sellectors customer web service.
Migrated a Flutter Web-based back office to Next.js and built management screens for orders, products, sellers, settlements, events, and inquiries.
Reduced repetitive operator work by applying search reset, CSV/Excel export, drag-and-drop sorting, shared tables, dialogs, and form components.

subtitleSystem.title: Content Operations Automation with AI Subtitle Translation

descriptions.subtitle: Expanded repetitive subtitle translation from CLI scripts to a web-based management tool
descriptions.detail: Subtitle translation consumed significant operations time as repetitive manual work, and improving content supply speed required a tool that operators could use rather than a developer-only script.
descriptions.skills: TypeScript, AWS Bedrock, OpenAI API, Google Cloud Translate, Express
tasks: Implemented subtitle file processing, language-specific prompts, chunk-based translation, translation validation, and character matching.
Reduced team resources spent on repetitive translation work by over 90% and increased productivity by more than 10x.
Built a workflow that allows one person to process 6-8 works per day.

shortimePlayground.title: Mobile WebView Playground Planning and Implementation

descriptions.subtitle: Built a webview-based product flow for fast in-app content experiments and updates
descriptions.detail: Fast content experiments inside the app required a webview-based product flow that was not tied to native release cycles, while mobile webviews required handling keyboard, safe area, loading, app-web communication, and game rendering constraints together.
descriptions.skills: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Phaser, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Flutter bridge, Airbridge
tasks: Implemented event and game-style content as Next.js-based mobile webviews.
Implemented Phaser games, ranking/result submission, banner and sound control, Flutter bridge, deep links, and marketing SDK integrations.
Created a webview-based experimentation space that can improve content independently from app releases.

descriptions.subtitle: Automated repetitive manual monitoring with a crawling-based tool
descriptions.detail: Checking for unauthorized content use required daily manual searches, repeatedly consuming operations time. The team needed an internal tool to gather search results quickly for review and judgment.
descriptions.skills: TypeScript, Express, Axios, Cheerio, Vercel Serverless Functions
tasks: Built a keyword-based crawling tool and result-review UI.
Reduced daily checking work from 50 minutes to under 10 minutes.
Organized the tool into a lightweight deployment structure based on Vercel Serverless Functions.
